name: Assembly
description: Assembly provides automated and flexible workflows for any performance management task. Start for FREE Learn more about Assembly

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Assembly has been very great so far, looking forward in getting the most out of this great site in recognizing colleagues/team members hard work.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use and quick access to reward points/redemptions. Assembly gives you value for many and has variety of gift options.
reviews.review_cons: So far, I have not encountered anything I dislike about using this product. Ease of use was top-notch

reviews.review_title: Assembly: A great place to get recognized
reviews.review_description: I have been using Assembly for about 2 years, and the best is the sharing of employee performance as a reward, and gift cards are really valuable for money. File sharing, I am not aware of so far; however, the learning curve that we can have with Dora AI is phenomenal. Overall, I am having a great time using Assembly.
reviews.review_pros: The best part of using Assembly is recognizing our fellow workers, and at the same time, we are also getting recognized. There are also different gift cards that we can redeem once the points are provided. It's always great to receive points as rewards and also be recognized. Overall, I found it to be the best platform.
reviews.review_cons: The least I like about Assembly is the customer support, which I feel can be much better. Since the feedback is always appreciated, I would recommend the team to be more active in instances for providing speedy resolution.

reviews.review_description: Lousy.
reviews.review_pros: I used to like it before Assembly legal took over the product.
reviews.review_cons: When Assembly Legal took over they made some changes and they don't work properly.

reviews.review_description: We've had a great experience! The team is helpful and quick to respond to any questions. The rewards are easy to customize and overall is well utilized.
reviews.review_pros: Assembly has been a great tool for our company! We are able to link employees from separate departments and encourage team members to send shout outs across different teams. Everyone on the team loves receiving rewards.
reviews.review_cons: Any major dislikes have been easily resolved by support. We have yet to come across any outages or performance issues.

reviews.review_title: Assembly- Great way to recognize your employees!
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with Assembly has been excellent. Once it’s set up, it really does what it promises — it makes recognition visible, engaging, and meaningful. It’s helped boost morale and create a stronger sense of connection across my team. I’d definitely recommend it to any organization that wants to build a culture of appreciation.
reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about Assembly is how easy it makes recognition and rewards for my team. The platform is really intuitive, with a clean design that makes giving and receiving “shout-outs” fun. The flexibility to customize recognition programs and the wide variety of reward options are big pluses.
reviews.review_cons: The only downside is that with so many features, it can take a little time to learn and set everything up the way you want. It’s not difficult, but there’s a bit of a learning curve if you want to take advantage of the more advanced options.

reviews.review_description: Assembly has been very easy to use whether making a post, reading/reacting to a post, or cashing in my trophies given for a gift card.
reviews.review_pros: The easy in which everyone can use it and access the program. It's quick and easy to make a post and/or review posts made.
reviews.review_cons: I wish there was more advertisement of activity, and not just the weekly activity wrap up email. While I am able to log in within a few seconds to see all activity, it is sometimes nice to receive the reminders.

reviews.review_title: The Digital High-Five I Didn’t Know I Needed
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Assembly has been really positive. The platform is intuitive, easy to navigate, and makes employee recognition feel natural and even fun. As user-friendly as the software is, I did run into a minor issue — but I was impressed by how quickly and efficiently the customer support team responded. It was a small hiccup, but their fast resolution actually reinforced my confidence in the product. Assembly has definitely helped boost morale and foster a more appreciative workplace culture.
reviews.review_pros: I love Assembly! It’s like Instagram for appreciation – everyone’s posting, liking, and sharing good vibes! Every day feels like National Compliment Day. You finish a task, and boom — digital high-five.
reviews.review_cons: I might be in the minority here, but I do wish there was an option to purchase additional points or convert them in some way beyond the current personal limits. Sometimes you just want to recognize a little extra, especially during big wins or team milestones.

reviews.review_title: Best way to reward your employees!
reviews.review_description: It's a wonderful way to celebrate and appreciate your coworkers for their hard work, leadership, and teamwork. I'm not in charge of the installation, but my colleague mentioned that it was very easy to install, and the support was quick and efficient.
reviews.review_pros: It's really simple to use, love the gift cards we can get, and I always look forward to earning rewards!
reviews.review_cons: It would be wonderful to have more reward options, especially tailored for my country. It would really mean a lot to see more choices that suit us. Thank you for considering this!

reviews.review_description: Overall my company has loved using Assembly. This company allows my company to give out points and recognize each other in a fun and meaningful way.
reviews.review_pros: Assembly is the easiest product to navigate. A product like Assembly should be easy to navigate as it is meant to be fun and quick.
reviews.review_cons: I really cannot think of many cons. If I had to pick one I would say that their mobile app specifically for Iphone could use some work. It requires me to sign back in every time I open it. It also is a bit confusing to navigate vs desktop.

reviews.review_title: A company that delivers on their value proposition
reviews.review_description: Overall, I would highly recommend assembly. Out of all of my years in working in tech it is the one software that has actually driven results to improve employee engagement.
reviews.review_pros: Lots of companies and softwares claim to help drive employee appreciation and incentives, but Assembly delivers. Not only is Assembly simple to use as far as redeeming rewards and earning then, but the integrations they have also make it seemless to implement into your employees workflow
reviews.review_cons: My only con would be to have a better way to filter for employees and have those stay. For example, my company is global so US employees see rewards that are only for employees in other countries.

reviews.review_title: Very easy to use and fun!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Assembly has been fun to use and I see that it has made it much easier for our team members to acknowledge each other's hard work. On the Admin side, we can easily see our reports and identify what is the main factor in contributing to employee work satisfaction. In fact, it seems to be encouraging employees to help each other more, which is great.
reviews.review_pros: Assembly is very easy to set up and even easier to invite team members. It has become a daily use for all of us. This program has helped enhance our culture-building efforts.
reviews.review_cons: There aren't any cons with this software at the moment. I realize they're still fairly new and are always taking suggestions and making improvements.

reviews.review_description: I use Assembly to create tasks and workflows that I need to maintain throughout the year and what I enjoy about it is that I can set reminders of when to check-in on various things.
reviews.review_pros: I enjoy Assembly because it helps me keep tasks extremely organized and gives me the ability to track them.
reviews.review_cons: Navigating the website can be a little confusing to start but once you start using it more it is not a problem.

reviews.review_title: Solid employee recognition product that only continues to improve
reviews.review_description: Assembly is a solid product with a good user experience. I also appreciate that they're making consistent updates and improvements to the UI to continue to build on that good user experience. It also has been an improvement on other employee recognition software we've used.
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to use, they have a solid user experience, and they continue to iterate on providing that good experience. Development team seems to be active. Easy to be able to give people recognition.
reviews.review_cons: My main gripe prior to some releases they did was that the UI wasn't clear on how many points someone received. They did make adjustments to this which I appreciated, but the overall UX/UI of the page doesn't feel very modern. Not a huge deal, but it'd be nice to have a better experience.

reviews.review_description: Assembly is very easy to use and offers a simple interface for recognizing your colleagues in a fast and painless manner. This helps boost employee engagement and morale, ensuring accomplishments are being shared with the wider organization.
reviews.review_pros: Recognizing your teammates and their contributions is easier than ever with Assembly. This spurs participation across the platform, spotlighting individual and team achievements for the rest of the organization to see.
reviews.review_cons: I have nothing negative to say about the platform. The user interface is well designed and easy to use. Sharing recognition is frictionless and built in AI features make it even easier to craft sincere and concise messages to recognize peers across the organization.

reviews.review_title: great product, easy to use, great support and integrations
reviews.review_description: great product, easy to use, great support and integrations. Seems like a great value for the product.
reviews.review_pros: love the easy integration with MS Teams, The platform is easy to use. The rewards options are great, points add up quickly, giving value to employees.
reviews.review_cons: would like more options for rewards, or gift cards that are available in Canada. would like more options for adding files to posts.. so others can see employee's great work.

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed using Assembly to give and receive recognition of a job well done. It allowed me to show creativity and align the compliments to company values. The platform was user friendly and cashing in for gift cards was easy. I'd recommend Assembly to others.
reviews.review_pros: Assembly is a great tool for rewarding employees. It is easy and fun to use. The option to cash in for gift cards or to donate to a charity is a nice option.
reviews.review_cons: As a user, I had trouble locating the Log Out button. I really didn't have any other issues or concerns.

reviews.review_title: Clean User Experience Simplifies Giving Praise
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I like the concept of giving people the opportunity to speak their minds in a positive way, and also receive praise, which is quite delightful these times where these little acts of generosity are scarce. I use it at least weekly to give recognition.
reviews.review_pros: I like the cleanliness of the execution side of the web UI. It's easy to use and easy to get on-boarded.
reviews.review_cons: When posts are really large, they get hidden, and sometimes even attached photos aren't seen. I don't like this behavior

reviews.review_description: Assembly is a great app for recognizing your fellow employees. Whether you are in it for the rewards or just to pat your team member on the back, Assembly will help you do just that.
reviews.review_pros: I like the different categories of rewards you can exchange for, such as gift cards to many restaurants and services.
reviews.review_cons: The AI draft assistant often doesn't meet my expectations. The interface is somewhat lackluster as well.

reviews.review_description: So far, it was the equivalent of getting a nice holiday meal on the company and a birthday gift, anniversary gift, etc. And a couple boosts to my morale...it has acted like a very generous boss taking care of his people!
reviews.review_pros: the rewards program of course, the recognition to individuals is a boost as well
reviews.review_cons: nothing to say, this program is all positives, how can you complain.

reviews.review_title: Awesome avenue to recognize people's contribution.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and the many options you can redeem the points earned.
reviews.review_cons: None. I am satisfied with the current features in Assembly.

reviews.review_description: I am new to Assembly as are my co-workers. But it is so slow sometimes that we cannot actually use it because it takes so long to change screens.
reviews.review_pros: It seems fairly easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes it is very, very slow. Sorry that is all I have to say.

reviews.review_description: Great experience
reviews.review_pros: I love being able to send recognition to colleagues who may have been overlooked
reviews.review_cons: I do not have any cons at this time. Thank you

reviews.review_description: It get's cross departmental collaboration without micro managing. It enables people to take initiative while maintaining company culture which everyone loves. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_pros: It get's cross departmental collaboration without micro managing. It enables people to take initiative while maintaining company culture which everyone loves. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_cons: I have no real Cons. I was an early user so the admin portal needed some updates which they have done.

reviews.review_description: Great
reviews.review_pros: What I like most about Assembly is the rewards aspect. It really is a positive
reviews.review_cons: What I dislike most about Assembly is that it is not a stand alone log in system.

reviews.review_title: Easy choice, clean design, easy to use.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We have several use cases for Assembly, to start with; we are a national brokerage focused on employee benefits and we often have to evaluate the best systems for our client's goals. We frequently recommend Assembly to them to help with employee and peer recognition efforts. We also use Assembly in house as our solution so we could intelligently talk to its actual use with clients considering it. Our entire staff enjoy it and use it weekly. Saying thanks is one of the most underused and cost-effective methods of employee retention out there, number 2 is saying thanks and gifts! The CarrotHR/Assembly team has been easy to reach and fast to respond to client feedback and support requests often offering to go further with more help than even requested, this is pretty rare for a Saas company model that usually is focused on self-service.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to set up. Simple concept that gets employees positively rewarding each other for good behavior.
reviews.review_cons: Recent branding change is positive but created some short confusion for a month while employees got used to the new name. Shouldn't be an issue for new clients now that the transition is complete.
